summary: Excellent front‑of‑house recording captures a stellar Dark Star > Playin' Reprise > Dark Star sequence and a soaring Truckin' > China > Rider stretch.
review: The reviewer rates this post‑77 show five stars, highlighting the modern‑day Dark Star suite as possibly the best of its era and urging listeners not to miss the high‑energy Truckin' > China > Rider. Sound quality is described as “pretty good,” with clear detail and no reported flaws, making the performance a joy to hear from start to finish.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review praises both the musical performance and the audio fidelity, suggesting an outstanding show with excellent recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, detailed front‑of‑house mix; no dropouts or muddiness mentioned.

standout_songs: Dark Star > Playin' Reprise > Dark Star
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is solid but a bit subdued after 'Feel Like a Stranger'; the second half erupts with intense jams, especially when Jerry engages his MIDI synth.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Ramble on Rose intensifies once Jerry gets the MIDI going; overall guitar work praised.
